title: Croatian Tortillas Tagine
description: A nutty and gooey Croatian dish featuring tortillas cooked in a tagine, perfect for a lazy Sunday. This sugar-free-friendly recipe is a unique twist on traditional Croatian cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the chicken breast to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the paprika and cumin to the skillet and stir to combine.
In a large tagine or Dutch oven, arrange 4 tortillas in the bottom.
Add the cooked chicken and onion mixture to the tagine.
Top with the remaining 4 tortillas and crumbled feta cheese.
Cover the tagine and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the tagine from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
